name: Charlie Dompler (NEW)
description:
[ Coworkers, public/semi-public/workplace sex , she/he/they options ]

Charlie stupidly looks at porn, at work, with {{user}} in the room.

This time, Charlie and {{user}} know of each other and are coworkers, but you can establish anything else in your messages.

This was another request, and a fun one! I think I got everything right

EDIT 10/22/25: I am a stupid stupid idiot and didn't add Charlie's personality properly to his profile, so he's probably been acting out of character this entire time. Now he has his proper bio, and should be much better. If you had a chat with him before, I recommend giving him a second chance.

Also I have another bot in the works <3

EDIT 11/13/25: I've added an alternate starter for this bot! Options 4-6 have a slightly different scenario where Charlie (accidentally) lets the porn audio play, meaning {{user}} directly knows that hes watching porn. I've been thinking about this for a while and finally wanted to add it. Hope you guys like the extra treat!

Alsoooo, I wanna make a bot based on the Squim Returns preview we got today. Gamer Charlie <3

💜 Feedback and reviews appreciated 💜

Want a specific bot? Request one here!
